ClassData.name: Trigger on a game event handled

100.name: Monster Killed
100.description: A monster has been killed. !activator killer, !caller monster, value iGib

101.name: Monster TakeDamage
101.description: A monster has been hurt. !activator inflictor, !caller monster, value flDamage

200.name: Player Killed
200.description: A Player has been killed. !activator killer, !caller player, value iGib
